nasb.text: Then falling on his knees, he cried out with a loud voice, “Lord, do not hold this sin against them!” Having said this, he fell asleep.

esv.text: And falling to his knees he cried out with a loud voice, “Lord, do not hold this sin against them.” And when he had said this, he fell asleep.

cnv.text: 然後跪下來大聲喊著說：“主啊，不要把這罪歸給他們！”說了這話，就睡了。

ccb.text: “主啊，不要追究他们的罪！”说完后，就断气了。

csbs.text: 然后他跪下，大声呼喊：“主啊，不要把这罪归于他们。”说了这话，他就睡了。
